functions.name: surface_tracker.utils.left_rotation
documentation:
Rotate list to the left
e.g.: [1, 2, 3, 4] -> [2, 3, 4, 1]

functions.name: surface_tracker.utils.right_rotation
documentation:
Rotate list to the right
e.g.: [1, 2, 3, 4] -> [4, 1, 2, 3]

methods.name: surface_tracker.corner.CornerId.all_corners
documentation:
Enumerate all corners.

Args:
    starting_with: First `CornerId` in the returned list.
    clockwise: Direction of the returned list.

Returns:
    List of `CornerId`

methods.name: surface_tracker.tracker.SurfaceTracker.surface_corner_positions_in_image_space
documentation: Return the corner positions in image space.

methods.name: surface_tracker.tracker.SurfaceTracker.surface_points_in_image_space
documentation: Transform a list of points in surface space into a list of points in image space.

methods.name: surface_tracker.tracker.SurfaceTracker.locate_surface
documentation: Computes a SurfaceLocation based on a list of visible markers

methods.name: surface_tracker.tracker._SurfaceTrackerArgumentValidator.validate_surface_and_location
documentation: Validate the pair of `surface` and `location` arguments
